description_long: This bungalow features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The structure is surrounded by lush landscaping, including several large trees and a detached pavilion with a gable roof. The main building has multiple large windows, some of which are grouped together, and a rooftop terrace with railings. The exterior appears to be finished with a combination of light-colored plaster or concrete and wood paneling, giving it a contemporary look. A stone pathway leads from the main entrance to the pavilion, enhancing the sense of connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. The overall setting suggests a comfortable, stylish residence designed for both privacy and outdoor living.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, rooftop terrace, and surrounding trees, accompanied by a detached pavilion.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, rooftop terrace, and the detached pavilion to the right, with trees framing the property.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pavilion in the foreground, the stone pathway, and dense tree coverage partially obscuring the bungalow.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade of the bungalow, grouped windows, and the rooftop terrace, with trees providing privacy.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the lush landscaping, palm trees, and the relationship between the bungalow and the pavilion.
